title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Suryagarha
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Suryagarha assembly segment.

title: High stakes battle in Suryagarha as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Suryagarha. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
